title: Mailchimp vs Flodesk (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Mailchimp vs Flodesk: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool for your needs.
intro: Choosing between Mailchimp and Flodesk comes down to your specific use case. Both are legitimate email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences. Mailchimp is built for beginners and small businesses, while Flodesk targets visual brands, photographers, and designers. This comparison covers the key differences so you can decide quickly.
choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on beginners and small businesses
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on visual brands, photographers, and designers

faq.a: It depends on your use case. Mailchimp wins for beginners and small businesses, while Flodesk is stronger for visual brands, photographers, and designers. Neither is objectively better — the right choice depends on your specific needs.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Mailchimp or Flodesk?
faq.a: Mailchimp starts at a lower price point ($13/mo vs $38/mo). However, pricing scales with subscriber count, so the total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Flodesk to Mailchimp?
faq.a: Yes, switching from Flodesk to Mailchimp is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export for subscriber lists. Plan for some time to recreate automations and templates, as these rarely transfer directly between platforms.
